titles.text: MTV Sports: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald
MTV Sports: Skateboarding - Featuring Andy Macdonald

roms.name: MTV Sports - Skateboarding Featuring Andy MacDonald (USA, Europe)

descriptions.text: MTV Sports: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonald is a sports video game developed by Darkblack and published by THQ for Game Boy Color, Microsoft Windows, PlayStation and Dreamcast. It features skateboarder Andy Macdonald on the cover.

MTV Sports: Skateboarding - Featuring Andy Macdonald est un jeu vidéo de simulation de skateboard, développé par Darkblack et édité par THQ, sorti en 2000 sur PlayStation, PC (Windows), Game Boy Color, Dreamcast. Il tire son nom du skateur Andy MacDonald.
MTV Sports: Skateboarding Featuring Andy Macdonaldは、Darkblackが開発し、THQがGame Boy Color、Microsoft Windows、PlayStation、Dreamcast向けに発売したスポーツビデオゲームです。表紙にはスケートボーダーのアンディ・マクドナルドが描かれています。
